transactions.desc: The Pirates recalled Rodriguez from Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday, Danny Demilio of PittsburghBaseballNow.com reports.
The Pirates recalled Bidois from Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday.
Trivino cleared waivers Tuesday and elected free agency, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Orioles recalled Wells from Triple-A Norfolk on Tuesday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
Garcia (back) completed his rehab assignment and has returned to Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday, Alex Stumpf of MLB.com reports.
The Athletics designated Nunez for assignment Tuesday.
The Athletics selected Stefanic's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Athletics optioned Harris to Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Athletics selected Bolte's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Pirates optioned Sanders to Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday, Alex Stumpf of MLB.com reports.
The Astros optioned VanWey to Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday, Julia Morales of Space City Home Network reports.
The Astros reinstated Imai (arm) from the 15-day injured list to start Tuesday's game against the Mariners, Julia Morales of Space City Home Network reports.
The Brewers optioned Black to Triple-A Nashville on Tuesday.
The Yankees are recalling Volpe from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Tuesday, Bryan Hoch of MLB.com reports.
The Brewers reinstated Yelich (groin) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday.
The Rockies optioned Gordon to Triple-A Albuquerque on Tuesday.
The Rockies reinstated Herget (personal) from the bereavement list Tuesday.
Atlanta selected Azocar's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Tuesday.
Atlanta optioned Jarvis to Triple-A Gwinnett on Tuesday.
The Mets designated Ibanez for assignment Tuesday.
The Mets selected Ewing's contract from Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Arizona Diamondbacks traded OF Alek Thomas to the Los Angeles Dodgers.
The Los Angeles Dodgers traded OF Jose Requena to the Arizona Diamondbacks.
The Orioles optioned Espada to Triple-A Norfolk on Tuesday.
The Orioles activated Rogers (illness) from the 15-day injured list to start Tuesday's game against the Yankees.
The Dodgers acquired Thomas from the Diamondbacks on Tuesday in exchange for Jose Requena, Francys Romero of BeisbolFR.com reports.
The Dodgers activated Betts (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Orioles selected Walker's contract from Triple-A Norfolk on Monday.
The Giants optioned Smith to Triple-A Sacramento on Monday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
The Giants optioned Porter to Triple-A Sacramento on Monday, Alex Pavlovic of NBC Sports Bay Area reports.
